stemHtml: Choose the correct statement about these Jet A and Jet B fuel…

options.a: Jet A has a freezing point of -60°C, and Jet B has a flash point of -20°C.
options.b: Jet A has a flash point of -25°C, and Jet B has a freezing point of -60°C.
options.c: Jet A has a freezing point of +40°C, and Jet B has a flash point of +38°C.
options.d: Jet A has a flash point of +38°C, and Jet B has a freezing point of -60°C.
